function.name: addToWaitlist
function.description: Adds a patient to the cancellation waitlist after collecting their details. Call this once you have confirmed the patient's name, phone number, and what service they need.

patient_name.description: Patient's full name as they stated it

phone.description: Patient's callback phone number including area code

preferred_days.description: Days of the week the patient prefers, e.g. 'Monday, Wednesday' or 'any day'

preferred_times.description: Time of day the patient prefers, e.g. 'mornings', 'after 3pm', 'any time'

service_needed.description: The dental service they need, e.g. 'cleaning', 'new patient exam', 'emergency', 'crown consultation'

priority.description: Set to 'urgent' if patient described pain, swelling, bleeding, broken tooth, or any emergency. Otherwise 'routine'.

notes.description: Any additional details the patient mentioned about their situation
